title: Dictionary
description: A dictionary container that holds key-value pairs accessible at the Fastly edge for use in VCL or Compute services.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the dictionary.

service_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

version.description: The version number the dictionary is associated with.

created_at.description: The date and time the dictionary was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the dictionary was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the dictionary was deleted.
